steps.title: Set up the total weight expression
steps.content:
The truck carries three types of load: a 210-pound machine, $x$ boxes at 28 pounds each, and $y$ boxes at 64 pounds each.
$$\text{Total weight} = 210 + 28x + 64y$$

steps.title: Apply the maximum capacity constraint
steps.content:
The total weight cannot exceed 5,940 pounds:
$$210 + 28x + 64y \le 5{,}940$$
Subtract 210 from both sides:
$$28x + 64y \le 5{,}730$$

steps.title: Evaluate each answer choice
steps.content:
• $28x+64y \le 5,730$ is correct.
  • B: $28x + 64y \ge 5{,}730$ — the $\ge$ direction would mean the load must be at least 5,730 pounds, not at most. Incorrect.
  • C: $64x + 28y \le 5{,}940$ — the coefficients are swapped (64 with $x$, 28 with $y$), and 210 was not subtracted. Incorrect.
  • D: $64x + 28y \ge 5{,}940$ — both the coefficients are swapped and the inequality direction is wrong. Incorrect.
